Role: 你是一位精通极简主义设计的前端工程师。

Task: 请帮我编写一个单页（Single-page）个人主页的代码（HTML 和 CSS），完全模仿图片（joanx.com）的视觉逻辑。

设计规范：

整体风格： 极简，背景色使用浅灰色（#F2F2F2），文字和图标使用深灰色。

Header： 页面顶部中心放置一个 Logo 占位图（Rowan 的头像图标），下方排列两个居中的导航按钮：'Works' 和 'About'。

Works 模块（首页默认显示）： > * 采用 4 列响应式网格布局。

请预留 8 个网格位，每个格子内包含一个正方形的图标占位图。

图标需要有优雅的悬停（Hover）缩放效果。

About 模块（点击切换展示）： > * 使用纯文字排版，保持大面积留白。

内容包含： * Header: Hi, I'm Rowan (李若兰). * Bio: 03年湖北人，INTJ-A，目前 base 深圳 。 * Education: 香港中文大学-管理学硕士，贵州大学-旅游管理本科 。 * Philosophy: 目标感、执行力、保持更新 。热爱品牌、营销、GTM 及出海领域 。




交互： 点击 'About' 时，Works 网格淡出，About 文字淡入；点击 'Works' 反之。

输出要求： 请提供一个完整的 HTML 文件，CSS 代码直接写在 <style> 标签内，确保代码在手机端也能完美适配。

**Designing the Interface**

I'm working on the initial visual design. I'm aiming for a minimalist single-page portfolio, inspired by "joanx.com". The background will be light gray (#F2F2F2), with dark gray text and icons. The header will feature Rowan's avatar as a central logo, with two navigation buttons. I'm focusing on simplicity and clean aesthetics.


**Defining the Structure**

Now, I'm defining the structural components: a 4-column responsive grid for the "Works" section, and a minimalist "About" section with ample white space. Fade transitions will handle the switch between the two. The tech stack will leverage React 18+, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. I've chosen Lucide React for the icons and Framer Motion for elegant fade transitions. I'm focusing on responsiveness and efficiency. I have started outlining the core files I intend to use as well.


**Refining the Color Palette**

I'm now refining the color palette for a minimalist feel. I'm settling on `#F2F2F2` for the background, with a dark gray text of either `#333333` or `#4A4A4A`. The avatar will be rounded. Nav buttons will be simple text with an underline or color change on active. I'm focusing on user readability.


**Confirming the Tech Stack**

I've confirmed the React and Tailwind tech stack, ensuring compliance. The avatar, sourced from DiceBear, will be integrated as the logo. I've got Lucide icons planned for the "Works" section, using rounded rect containers reminiscent of "joanx.com". I'm structuring the grid responsively using Tailwind classes and simple opacity transitions. I have started outlining the core files I intend to use as well.


**Implementing the Styles**

I'm now implementing the styles. I will use a serif or very clean sans-serif font for a high-end minimalist look, and verifying the hover effect. The header will have an 80px circular avatar and navigation with a subtle active state indicator. For the works section, each card will be aspect-square with a rounded, white background, and the about section will have a max-width and use Inter or a standard sans font. I will keep it simple and clean.

payload.text:
Role: 极简主义前端开发专家，擅长响应式排版与动效设计。

Task: 请为我的个人主页开发 Professional Practice 详情模块。

设计要求：

整体视觉： 延续 joanx.com 的高留白、浅灰背景（#F2F2F2）和深色文字。

顶部轨迹图 (Horizontal Timeline): - 页面顶部展示一行横向排列的 Logo + 公司名称（NIO -> DJI -> Tangcheng -> Feishu -> Disneyland）。

图标需保持极简单色，悬停时触发彩色。

分栏详情 (Split-Screen Layout):

左侧 (60%): 详细职责文本。

右侧 (40%): 预留图片占位符。

每个项目之间保持较大的垂直间距。

详细内容集成（按时间倒序）：

2025.11 | Hong Kong Disneyland (Visitor / Creative Inspiration)

核心内容： 沉浸式体验与全球 IP 运营观察。

职责描述： 在全球最具魔力的目的地之一，以访客身份深度调研其沉浸式叙事逻辑与多感官体验设计，为品牌营销寻找跨界灵感。

2024.11 – 2025.07 | ByteDance (Feishu) - 品牌营销实习生

职责描述：


大型市场 Campaign 操盘： 全流程策划亿级商机项目【2025 飞书发布会】，统筹小鹏、安克、亚朵等 20+ 参展客户，实现直播 UV 累计 250w+，年同比增长 114%，百度/微信指数激增 201% 。




产品整合营销： 落地 7 场 200人+ 行业论坛，独立策划霸王茶姬互动展区，实现现场 2040人 参与，参与率高达 71% 。




品牌策略与转化： 制定《2024年度报告》传播策略，捕获高价值线索 2136 条，MQL 转化率 7.2%，总触达 627万 次 。



GTM 包装： 专项制作 AI 产品营销物料，调研机场广告效果并推动华南区域 Logo 墙完成 “AI+场景化” 焕新 。


2024.06 – 2024.08 | 中国唐城影视基地 - 市场营销实习生

职责描述：


IP 主题营销： 借势《庆余年2》设计国风路线，发起社交媒体话题，短视频互动播放达 32.5 亿+ 次，带动暑期线下游客量同比增长 200% 。



新媒体运营： 执行暑期内容策略，创作多篇爆款攻略，单篇最高浏览量 10万+，账号累计涨粉 1k+ 。



直播支持： 参与运营 5 场直播，控制现场节奏与互动，单场在线峰值突破 2.3w+ 人 。


2024.02 – 2024.06 | 大疆创新 (DJI Automotive) - 人力资源实习生

职责描述：


招聘全链路管理： 管理 99 个 实习生 HC 及社招需求，筛选 4000+ 份 简历，发放 80 份 Offer，成功入职 71 人 。




校园大使项目： 招募并管理 20 所 高校 200+ 人 校园大使社群，通过社交平台矩阵预热校招，大幅提升雇主品牌影响力 。


2023.11 – 2024.01 | 蔚来汽车 (NIO Inc.) - 市场活动实习生

职责描述：


活动策划与执行： 执行大型车展及路演，负责供应商管理与现场 Timeline 控制，线索转化率达 19.8%，有效降低 CPL 获客成本 。




品牌传播： 运营外部矩阵，发布 12 篇品牌深度内容，UV 同比上涨 120%，策划茅台联名购车等跨界合作 。


代码要求： 请提供完整的 HTML 和 CSS，确保左右分栏在屏幕滚动时有优雅的淡入效果，图片占位符需保持统一的比例。

**Defining the Style**

I'm focused on creating the "Professional Practice" module for the portfolio. The plan is to channel the minimalist aesthetics of joanx.com, embracing a light gray background (#F2F2F2), ample whitespace, and dark text for optimal readability. I want the design to be clean, modern, and easily understood.


**Developing the Workflow**

I've been working on the technical implementation of the "Professional Practice" module. Currently, I'm focusing on the component structure. I've added a `ViewState` type to manage the navigation to the detail page and implemented routing within `App.tsx` to handle the new view. The first item in `Works.tsx`, now correctly triggers the navigation to the detail view. I'm building out the new component, `ProfessionalPractice.tsx`, including the timeline design. The background is set to `#F2F2F2`.


**Structuring the Data**

I'm now outlining the data structure for the "Professional Practice" module's timeline entries. Each entry will have a title (company and role), a date, content (bullet points or paragraphs), and a placeholder image on the right (16:9 or 4:3 aspect ratio). I'm planning to use CSS transitions, Intersection Observer, or Tailwind classes for fade-in animations. I'm also preparing the data. I've updated `types.ts` and `App.tsx` to include and handle the new view state. Finally, `Works.tsx` has been updated to enable the first item click.


**Refining the Navigation**

I'm now integrating the "Professional Practice" module into the overall navigation flow. I've updated `App.tsx` with a switch statement for the new view state and added an `onSelectWork(id)` callback in `Works.tsx` to trigger navigation. I'm exploring Tailwind's `sticky` class or a top header for the timeline in `ProfessionalPractice.tsx`. I'm designing the timeline icons with monochrome representations or text-based logos, adding color on hover. I'm choosing Inter font for typography, tight tracking for headers, and loose leading for body. I also have to ensure that the 60/40 split stacks properly on mobile and "Back to Works" navigation is available.

To satisfy your request, I will implement the **Professional Practice** detail module. This involves updating the navigation logic to allow "drilling down" into specific project details, and creating a sophisticated, high-end split-screen layout for your career history.

### Specification:
1.  **State Management**: Update `ViewState` to include `'practice'` to allow the app to switch to the detailed professional view when the "Professional Practice" grid item is clicked.
2.  **Horizontal Timeline**: A sleek, monochrome-to-color interactive timeline at the top of the detail page featuring the logos/names of the 5 companies.
3.  **Split-Screen Layout**: 
    *   **Left (60%)**: Clean typography, bold dates, and structured bullet points for your achievements.
    *   **Right (40%)**: Large, consistent aspect-ratio image placeholders with subtle hover effects.
4.  **Content Integration**: All 5 professional experiences integrated in reverse chronological order (Disneyland down to NIO).
5.  **Animations**: Graceful scroll-triggered fade-ins for each experience block to maintain the premium, minimalist feel of `joanx.com`.

entries.description: Add 'practice' to ViewState to support the new detail page navigation.
Update App component to handle the new 'practice' view with smooth transitions.
Add onSelect prop to navigate to detail views when clicking on specific items.
New component for the Professional Practice detail module featuring a horizontal timeline and split-screen project summaries.

**Visualizing Durations in Timeline**

I'm currently focused on representing experience durations within the `ProfessionalPractice.tsx` component's timeline. My primary aim is to depict each experience as a distinct segment, with its length and thickness visually corresponding to the time interval it spans. Thinking of short line segments of varying lengths and thicknesses seems a viable approach.


**Revising Timeline Structure**

I'm now overhauling the timeline's fundamental structure. It seems the best solution is to move from the existing winding curve to a more explicit horizontal axis. I'm updating the `TIMELINE_DATA` to include start and end dates, which will allow for representing intervals. I'm aiming for horizontal line segments of varied lengths and thicknesses, with logos and information positioned relative to each segment. I plan to blend the concepts together.


**Refining Data Representation**

I've refined the approach to representing experience durations, moving towards a horizontal axis with segments to represent the time intervals, like a minimalist Gantt chart. I've re-worked the timeline data, `TIMELINE_DATA`, to include explicit start and end dates. The winding curve is being revisited for possible integration. I'll maintain a minimalist visual style with a #F2F2F2 background and clean lines, keeping the look simple.


**Adapting Visualization Technique**

I'm now shifting gears on the visual approach. I'm moving away from the winding curve for representing time intervals, focusing instead on a linear "interval-based" timeline. I've been interpreting the user's feedback as favoring simple, structured representation using differently sized segments. I will be working on a flexible container and rendering bars representing the timeline entries. I need to make sure the scroll-to-click functionality remains intact. ### 第一部分：竞赛内容分类梳理

#### 分类一：FMCG Competition | 快消商赛

* **L'Oréal BrandStorm 2025**
* 
**奖项：** **全国 TOP 50** 


* 
**描述：** 依托“护肤 + AI + 云计算”模式，构建覆盖用户全生命周期的护肤服务体系。通过实时皮肤数据监测提供个性化方案，整合社区运营、游戏化激励及数字人陪伴功能，解决男性护肤知识匮乏、习惯难坚持等痛点 。


* 
**职责：** * **队长职责：** 主导核心创意方向，明确 **“刺激-陪伴-成长”** 的用户运营逻辑，制定 GTM 和营销策略 。


* 
**产品设计：** 规划 AI 智能卡片、数字人陪伴、游戏化激励的功能逻辑与交互流程 。


* 
**商业分析：** 负责市场研究、**盈利分析**与可持续发展战略，设计高效转化路径 。







#### 分类二：Campus Competition | 校园竞赛

* **“互联网+”大学生创新创业大赛**
* 
**奖项：** **省级一等奖** 


* 
**描述：** 创立“同和一舍”国韵客舍民宿项目，以“赓续国学传承”为品牌理念，在贵州打造一体化旅游服务体系，带动当地文旅经济发展 。


* 
**职责：** * **队长职责：** 搭建民宿 **PERC 商业模式**，主导品牌营销与新媒体推广 。


* 
**成果：** 运营多平台账号，累计获得 **8.5万+ 浏览量** 和 **500+ 收藏**，助力民宿与 **10 家单位** 达成合作 。






* **“正大杯”全国大学生市场调研大赛**
* 
**奖项：** **国家级奖项** 


* 
**描述：** 针对贵州蜡染文创产品的消费者购买偏好展开研究，探索“互联网+”模式下传统文创产品的年轻化销售路径 。


* 
**职责：** * **调研分析：** 运用 **AISAS 模型** 分析消费者行为特征，结合 **Logistic 模型** 确定 18-25 岁为主要购买人群 。


* 
**产品落地：** 负责蜡染玩偶系列的产品设计与数字营销推广，输出 SWOT 及 PESTEL 分析 。


> **Role:** 极简主义网页设计师，精通 Typography（排版学）。
> **Task:** 请为我的个人主页编写 `Strategic Competition` 详情页。
> **设计规范：**
> 1. **视觉风格：** 严格遵循 `joanx.com` 的设计语言。背景 `#F2F2F2`，使用高对比度的黑色加粗标题。
> 2. **分类导航：** 页面顶部有两组大字号标题：`FMCG Competition` 和 `Campus Competition`，点击可快速跳转至对应区块。
> 3. **项目排版：** >     * 每个竞赛项目占据一个独立的“大卡片”区域（无边框，通过大留白区分）。
> * **左侧 (30%)：** 展示奖项名称（加粗、大字号）和年份。
> * **右侧 (70%)：** 展示项目描述和详细职责。
> * **职责部分：** 使用极简的连字符 `-` 代替复杂的 Bullet points。
> 
> 
> 4. **特别强调：** 将文案中的所有**核心数据**（如 Top 50, 8.5万+, 250w+ 等）进行加粗处理。
> 5. **交互：** 页面加载时，竞赛项目应依次从底部缓缓向上滑入（Stagger animation）。
> 
> 
> **内容集成：**
> [此处粘贴上面我为你整理的“竞赛内容分类梳理”文本]
> **代码要求：** 请提供完整的 HTML/CSS 代码，确保在宽屏下显示为双栏，在手机端自动变为单栏。

---

### 给你的专业建议：

1. **视觉区隔：** 在 `FMCG Competition`（快消商赛）部分，建议在背景中加入一个非常淡的、半透明的 L'Oréal Logo 轮廓，这样能瞬间提升页面的行业感，而 `Campus Competition` 则保持纯净背景。

**作品链接：** 你在简历中提到了 L'Oréal 的介绍视频 。在代码生成的 L'Oréal 部分，可以要求 AI 加入一个 `[Watch Video]` 的极简文字链接，点击后直接跳转到你的视频地址。

I am anticipating needing to modify the app's structure to accommodate this new section.


**Defining Competition Structure**

I'm now focusing on defining the structure for the competition section. I plan to use `components/Works.tsx` to display grid-style category links to `FMCG Competition` and `Campus Competition`. I'm going to model the design on `joanx.com`, with a minimalist and high-end feel, using a `#F2F2F2` background, bold black headings, and top navigation links for specific categories. This will require updates to `types.ts` and `App.tsx` to support a new view state. **Refining Strategic Layout**

I'm now refining the layout of the "Strategic Competition" section. I'm focusing on the `StrategicCompetition.tsx` component, specifically the container with `max-w-5xl`. I'm setting up an intersection observer for stagger animation and considering sticky category sub-headers. I'll utilize a grid layout with Tailwind (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[30%_1fr]`). **Considering Component Modification**

I'm currently focused on refactoring the `ProjectDetail.tsx` component. The immediate goal is to swap out the existing YouTube `iframe` for a static image, specifically the one located at `https://i.postimg.cc/SxjxW2hh/Screen-Shot-2026`. This change aims to simplify the component's structure and improve performance, considering a more efficient rendering of a static image.

entries.description: 将 BrandStorm 项目中的嵌入式视频模块替换为一张带有跳转链接的封面图，点击可直接跳转至 YouTube 观看。

payload.text: base solution的图标换成这个https://i.postimg.cc/76jWQRGr/20260126-175928.png

**Updating Icon Placement**

I'm currently focused on the `Works.tsx` component. The key task is to swap out the existing icon for "Base Solution" with the image located at `https://i.postimg.cc/76jWQRGr/20260126-175928.png`. I'm in the process of implementing that image URL.


**Refactoring Item Structure**

I'm thinking about how to handle image icons within `WORK_ITEMS`. My current plan is to add a new `image` field to the `WorkItem` type, instead of altering the existing `icon` field. This would allow me to maintain the flexibility of using either emojis or image URLs. I will need to update the rendering logic to check for the presence of an `image` URL.


**Implementing Image Icon Logic**

I've decided to proceed directly with modifying `Works.tsx`. After examining `types.ts`, it seems the existing `WorkItem` interface is already flexible enough to handle image URLs for the `icon` field. The `WORK_ITEMS` array in `Works.tsx` has been updated with the image URL for the "Base Solution" item (`id: 3`). Now, I'm working on the conditional rendering logic in the JSX to display an `img` tag when an image URL is detected for an `icon`.

entries.description: 将 Base Solution 的图标从 Emoji 替换为指定的图片 URL，并优化了 Works 网格的渲染逻辑以支持图片图标，同时保持灰度转换和悬停缩放的视觉一致性。

payload.text: 小一点点，长款和其他形状保持一致

**Adjusting Icon Dimensions**

I'm focusing on the "Base Solution" icon, aiming for visual consistency within the `Works.tsx` component. The current size (w-20 h-20 md:w-28 md:h-28) needs adjustment to align with other image icons. I'm exploring how to apply the same dimension logic effectively.


**Refining Icon Consistency**

I'm now zeroing in on achieving visual harmony between image and emoji icons within the `Works.tsx` component. The user wants the image icons a bit smaller and consistent in shape/visual weight with the existing emoji icons. I'm thinking of reducing image icon dimensions from `w-20 h-20` (or `md:w-28 md:h-28`) to possibly `w-16 h-16` or `w-14 h-14`. I'll also tweak the grayscale and opacity to keep visual consistency, possibly with padding. It's about ensuring the image icons occupy a similar "visual boundary" as the larger emojis.

entries.description: 缩小了 Base Solution 图片图标的尺寸，使其在视觉量感上与其它 Emoji 图标更加和谐一致，同时保持了纯净的灰阶交互效果。
